DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION]
( 
	[OrganizationID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[CompanyID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CompanyName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CompanyType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[OrganizationGroup] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
